title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Fabindia Online is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online:
Fabindia Online is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online!
